- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify project requirements.
- [x] Scaffold the project in the current workspace.
- [x] Customize the project according to requirements.
- [x] Install required extensions (not required for this project).
- [x] Compile the project and resolve issues.
- [x] Create and run task (handled via npm scripts).
- [x] Launch the project.
- [x] Ensure documentation is complete.

Current project information:
- Full-stack MERN SaaS app: Smart Resume Analyzer & Job Matcher
- Frontend: React + Vite + Tailwind + Framer Motion + Recharts
- Backend: Express + MongoDB + JWT + Google OAuth endpoint + AI analysis
- Deployment ready for Vercel (frontend) + Render/Railway (backend)
